entities.summary: The Great Evil; fallen/perverted form of Creotar (Creo). Opponent/corrupting force tied to Nefarium and the Shroud. Plants false gods and demi-god patrons into local cults.
openQuestions: Exact mechanism of influence over Luceran and Imperium authority

entities.summary: God of knowledge and creation; Creo is the short form of the same being. Act 0 vision guide who warns about Luceran and the Nefarium Shroud. Frangitur is the fallen form of this being (locked Dom + owner 2026-07-20).
openQuestions: Whether Act 0 'destroy the Shroud' guidance is honest or dramatic irony vs Frangitur's prologue
Creator-origin crystal location and current holder

entities.summary: False deity of the Calrenoth watershed cult (The Thalassar + The Underflow). Hinted true name for narrative; public rite titles Muirthalia (Thalassar) and Grakk-Maren (Underflow). Not a true god — a lieutenant of Luceran the Hollow planted by Frangitur; Underflow rite perverted. Candidate early Act 1 boss.
openQuestions: When the false nature is confirmed to the player
Lieutenant display name if distinct from cult title
